samples.gvd:
module counter_12(
    input rst_n,
    input clk,
    input valid_count,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else if (valid_count) begin
        if (out == 4'd11) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end
        else begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end
    else begin
        out <= out;
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state">
            <enum_value id="RESET">Reset state, where the counter is set to 0.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="INCREMENT">Increment state, where the counter is incremented by 1.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="WRAP">Wrap state, where the counter wraps around to 0 after reaching the maximum value of 11.</enum_value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <not>
                        <identifier id="rst_n"/>
                    </not>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <identifier id="out"/>
                    <assign>
                        <constant id="4'b0000"/>
                    </assign>
                </then>
            </if>
            <else>
                <if>
                    <condition>
                        <identifier id="valid_count"/>
                    </condition>
                    <then>
                        <if>
                            <condition>
                                <equal>
                                    <identifier id="out"/>
                                    <constant id="4'd11"/>
                                </equal>
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <identifier id="out"/>
                                <assign>
                                    <constant id="4'b0000"/>
                                </assign>
                            </then>
                            <else>
                                <identifier id="out"/>
                                <assign>
                                    <binary_operator>
                                        <identifier id="out"/>
                                        <constant id="4'b0001"/>
                                        <operator id="+"/>
                                    </binary_operator>
                                </assign>
                            </else>
                        </if>
                    </then>
                </if>
            </else>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
